name: conjure
shortDescription: Production-grade init kit. Lazy-loaded skills, hooks, subagents, knowledge graph, stack profiles, safe migration.
longDescription: Conjure is a four-layer harness for Claude Code projects: CLAUDE.md (advisory) + Skills (lazy progressive disclosure) + Subagents (isolated context) + Hooks (deterministic enforcement). Integrates graphify for persistent knowledge graphs, context7 for live framework docs, ast-grep for structural search, repomix for full-codebase context, Postgres MCP for schema introspection. Ships with 8 stack profiles (Java-Spring, Python-FastAPI, TS-Next, Rust-Axum, Go-Gin, Node-Nest, Monorepo, Polyglot, Data Science), 4 compliance overlays (HIPAA, SOC 2, GDPR, PCI), and safe migration paths from Cursor, Aider, Continue, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, and existing hand-rolled .claude/ configs. Built on 2026 best practices: ≤100-line CLAUDE.md, trigger-action rule format, compaction-aware ordering, compound-engineering loop.
